arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. PSG: Official Starting Lineups for Second Leg in Champions League
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain will be looking to overcome a 1-0 aggregate deficit against Liverpool at Anfield, and now the starting 11 for the two sides are revealed. The home side will be looking to at least hold onto their advantage if not increase their lead. Nonetheless, the Reds cannot play with fire like they did in […] The post Liverpool vs. PSG: Official Starting Lineups for Second Leg in Champions League appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konate 'privately admits he SHOULD have been' sent off against PSG last week - after Liverpool star's clumsy challenge on Bradley Barcola
arts.sum: Konate, 25, played the full 90 minutes of the Champions League last-16 clash on Wednesday as Liverpool secured a remarkable 1-0 victory despite PSG dominating the clash.

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Paris Saint-Germain: Champions League last 16, second leg – live
arts.sum: Champions League news, 8pm GMT kick-off (first leg: 1-0) Live scores | Read Football Daily | And you can mail Yara So, both teams field the exact same XI as the first leg. Slot makes three changes to the Liverpool team that started against Southampton on Saturday: Robertson, Mac Allister and Jota replace Tsimikas, Jones and Núñez. Gakpo is fit enough for the bench after recovering from the ankle knock. Continue reading...
